name: First Load JS (shared)
notes: React + Next.js framework chunk. Rarely changes.

name: Total First Load JS
notes: Sum of all JS shipped on first navigation. Covers shared chunks + page chunk.

name: Total build output (JS)
notes: Aggregate of all JS chunks across all routes (gzip). Tracks overall growth trend.

name: Shop Grid route JS
notes: Shop page + ShopGrid + ShopItem components. Skeleton cards (min-h-[160px]) prevent CLS by reserving card dimensions during loading.
